window.label: Entire history
window.phrase: the entire available history up to 2026-07-22

evidence.claim: ADQ officially launched the massive $35 billion Ras El Hekma development project master plan in October 2024.
evidence.snippet: ADQ unveiled the comprehensive master plan for the Ras El Hekma mega-development on Egypt's Mediterranean coast, representing a landmark $35 billion investment project.

evidence.claim: AD Ports Group finalized a 30-year concession to manage Safaga Port on Egypt's Red Sea coast in November 2024.
evidence.snippet: AD Ports Group signed a definitive 30-year concession agreement to develop and operate the Safaga 1 multi-purpose terminal on the Red Sea.

evidence.claim: Masdar and Infinity Power progressed development of a 10 GW onshore wind farm in Egypt in December 2024.
evidence.snippet: Masdar and its partners secured land access agreements with the Egyptian government for a landmark 10 GW onshore wind project.

evidence.claim: DP World invested $80 million in October 2024 to expand handling capacity at Sokhna Port, Egypt.
evidence.snippet: DP World announced a major $80 million expansion program at its Sokhna port terminal to enhance logistics and storage capacity.

evidence.claim: Mubadala Energy conducted offshore exploratory drilling in Egypt's Red Sea Block 4 in August 2024.
evidence.snippet: Mubadala Energy commenced seismic and exploratory drilling campaigns in its Red Sea concession block in collaboration with Egyptian state entities.

evidence.claim: The UAE Central Bank rolled over a $5.7 billion deposit with Egypt to support its economy in August 2024.
evidence.snippet: The Central Bank of the UAE extended the maturity of its $5.7 billion deposit with the Central Bank of Egypt.

evidence.claim: EDGE Group signed a defense production deal with Egypt's Arab Organization for Industrialization in November 2024.
evidence.snippet: EDGE Group agreed to co-develop advanced smart weapons and optical systems with Egypt's Arab Organization for Industrialization.

evidence.claim: Abu Dhabi Fund for Development approved a $100 million grant for Egypt's education sector in January 2025.
evidence.snippet: The Abu Dhabi Fund for Development authorized a $100 million financial package to upgrade vocational training institutes across Egypt.

evidence.claim: G42 announced an expansion of cloud services into Egyptian public sector entities in September 2024.
evidence.snippet: G42 entered a joint venture to build localized AI cloud infrastructure and digital governance portals for the Egyptian government.

evidence.claim: ADNOC and Egypt's state gas company finalized a joint LNG marketing agreement in early February 2025.
evidence.snippet: ADNOC established a joint marketing venture with Egypt's EGAS to optimize LNG distribution and terminal access.

edges.claim: ADQ officially launched the massive $35 billion Ras El Hekma development project master plan in October 2024.
AD Ports Group finalized a 30-year concession to manage Safaga Port on Egypt's Red Sea coast in November 2024.
Masdar and Infinity Power progressed development of a 10 GW onshore wind farm in Egypt in December 2024.
DP World invested $80 million in October 2024 to expand handling capacity at Sokhna Port, Egypt.
Mubadala Energy conducted offshore exploratory drilling in Egypt's Red Sea Block 4 in August 2024.
The UAE Central Bank rolled over a $5.7 billion deposit with Egypt to support its economy in August 2024.
EDGE Group signed a defense production deal with Egypt's Arab Organization for Industrialization in November 2024.
Abu Dhabi Fund for Development approved a $100 million grant for Egypt's education sector in January 2025.
G42 announced an expansion of cloud services into Egyptian public sector entities in September 2024.
ADNOC and Egypt's state gas company finalized a joint LNG marketing agreement in early February 2025.
